reads.aggregation: NOT a persisted table. The activity feed is a DERIVED, aggregated union computed client-side in AppRepository.watchDashboardWithActivityCap(cap) (activity screen uses cap=200 via watchActivity(); dashboard uses cap=8). It merges three drift sources into one timeline: (1) every Payment whose parent debt still exists -> kind=payment, title 'Payment received', subtitle=customer.name, amount=payment.amount; (2) every Debt -> kind=debt, title 'Debt added', subtitle=customer.name (+ ' · ' + debt.note when present), amount=debt.amount; (3) every Reminder with sentAt != null whose parent debt exists -> kind=reminder, title 'Reminder sent', subtitle=customer.name + ' · ' + channel(SMS/WhatsApp/Call), amount=null. The combined list is sorted by `at` descending and truncated to the cap. title/subtitle/channel labels are composed in the client from underlying rows; the ActivityItem model itself carries NO related-entity ids (debtId/customerId/paymentId/reminderId are used only internally to build subtitle and are dropped from the emitted shape).
filtersOrSort: filter: payments/reminders whose parent debt no longer exists are excluded; only reminders with sentAt != null included

notes: UI: lib/screens/misc/activity_screen.dart — StreamBuilder over repo.watchActivity() -> List<ActivityItem>, rendered as an un-truncated ActivityTimelineRow list (full version of the dashboard 'Recent activity' preview). Empty state 'Nothing yet / Debts, payments and reminders land here.' shown when snapshot.hasData && items.isEmpty. No error state handled. No mutations on this screen. As-built the amount is whole-naira int (int? amount); per Supersede S-1 wire type is integer kobo. Tenancy: feed is implicitly scoped to the business (offline-first drift store). Realtime marked false: fed by a drift Stream (local reactive query), not a server push channel; backend equivalent is delta pull per conventions sync protocol.
